name: io.github.DustinTrap/kvm-pilot
description: AI-agent control of physical machines via IP-KVM, Redfish BMC, and SSH: gated, verified, audited.

environmentVariables.name: KVM_PILOT_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Profile name from ~/.config/kvm-pilot/config.toml naming the KVM/BMC to target

environmentVariables.name: KVM_PILOT_MCP_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Least-privilege posture: only read-only tools are registered; effect gates force-closed. Recommended for first contact (set to 1)

environmentVariables.name: KVM_PILOT_MCP_DRY_RUN
environmentVariables.description: Rehearsal posture: destructive calls are logged, never sent (set to 1)

environmentVariables.name: KVM_PILOT_MCP_ALLOW_POWER
environmentVariables.description: Operator opt-in enabling power control of the managed host (per-effect gate; see also _ALLOW_HID, _ALLOW_MEDIA, _ALLOW_SSH, _ALLOW_APPLIANCE, _ALLOW_EXTERNAL_WRITE)

environmentVariables.name: KVM_PILOT_PASSWD
environmentVariables.description: Device password when not using a config-file profile (KVM_PILOT_HOST / KVM_PILOT_USER accompany it)

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional: enables server-side vision for classify_screen / wait_for_state; without it, classification falls back to the calling agent
